problem_text_cn: 一飞轮的角速度在5秒内由900转/分均匀地减到800转/分。求：1) 角加速度$\beta$；2) 在此5秒内的总转数；3) 再经几秒，轮将停止转动。
problem_text_en: The angular velocity of a flywheel decreases uniformly from 900 revolutions per minute to 800 revolutions per minute in 5 seconds. Find: 1) The angular acceleration $\beta$; 2) The total number of revolutions in these 5 seconds; 3) How many more seconds will it take for the wheel to stop rotating.
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】1) 由于飞轮在此5秒内均匀地减慢转动，所以角加速度为常量，且方向与角速度方向相反。设$\omega_0 = 900 \, \text{转/分} = \dfrac{900 \cdot 2\pi}{60} \, \text{弧度/秒}$，$\omega = 800 \, \text{转/分} = \dfrac{800 \cdot 2\pi}{60} \, \text{弧度/秒}$，$t = 5 \, \text{秒}$，所以飞轮的角加速度为
$$
\beta = \frac{\omega - \omega_0}{t} = \frac{(800 - 900) \cdot 2\pi}{60 \times 5} = -\frac{2\pi}{3} \, \text{弧度/秒}^2 = -2.09 \, \text{弧度/秒}^2
$$

2) 在此5秒内的总转数$n$为
$$
n = \frac{\Delta \varphi}{2\pi} = \frac{1}{2\pi} \left(\omega_0 t + \frac{1}{2} \beta t^2\right) = \frac{900}{60} \times 5 - \frac{1}{2} \times \frac{1}{3} \times 25 = 70.8 \, \text{（转）}
$$

3) 设再过$\tau$秒，飞轮将停止转动，则
$$
0 = \omega_0 + \beta (t + \tau)
$$
解得
$$
\tau = -\frac{\omega_0}{\beta} - t = \frac{900 \cdot 2\pi}{60} \cdot \frac{3}{2\pi} - 5 = 40 \, \text{（秒）}
$$
即，再过40秒飞轮停止转动。
problem_solution_en:
【Analysis and Solution】1) Since the flywheel slows down uniformly over 5 seconds, the angular acceleration is constant and opposite to the angular velocity. Let $\omega_0 = 900 \, \text{rev/min} = \dfrac{900 \cdot 2\pi}{60} \, \text{rad/s}$, $\omega = 800 \, \text{rev/min} = \dfrac{800 \cdot 2\pi}{60} \, \text{rad/s}$, and $t = 5 \, \text{s}$. The angular acceleration is:
$$
\beta = \frac{\omega - \omega_0}{t} = \frac{(800 - 900) \cdot 2\pi}{60 \times 5} = -\frac{2\pi}{3} \, \text{rad/s}^2 = -2.09 \, \text{rad/s}^2
$$

2) The total number of revolutions $n$ in 5 seconds is:
$$
n = \frac{\Delta \varphi}{2\pi} = \frac{1}{2\pi} \left(\omega_0 t + \frac{1}{2} \beta t^2\right) = \frac{900}{60} \times 5 - \frac{1}{2} \times \frac{1}{3} \times 25 = 70.8 \, \text{（revolutions）}
$$

3) Let $\tau$ be the additional time until the flywheel stops. Then:
$$
0 = \omega_0 + \beta (t + \tau)
$$
Solving for $\tau$:
$$
\tau = -\frac{\omega_0}{\beta} - t = \frac{900 \cdot 2\pi}{60} \cdot \frac{3}{2\pi} - 5 = 40 \, \text{（seconds）}
$$
Thus, the flywheel stops after an additional 40 seconds.
img_cn: 飞轮匀减速转动的题目与计算过程。
img_en: Problem and calculation process for the uniformly decelerating rotation of a flywheel.
problem_answer:
1) 角加速度 $\beta = -\dfrac{2\pi}{3} \, \text{弧度/秒}^2 \, (\text{或} \, -2.09 \, \text{弧度/秒}^2)$；
2) 5秒内的总转数 $n = 70.8 \, \text{转}$；
3) 再经 $\tau = 40 \, \text{秒}$ 飞轮停止转动。
